case_title: MORGAN STATNLEY & CO. INCORPORATED VS. Q INVESTMENTS LIMITED PARTNERSHIP

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT Q INVESTMENTS LIMITED PARTNERSHIP RECOVER FROM PETITIONER MORGAN STATNLEY & CO.
